content.speakerText: Alright, we've logged your report. Stay calm.
content.speakerTextCn: 好的，我们已记录你的报告，别紧张。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much for your help!
Thanks a lot—I really appreciate it!
I'm so grateful for your assistance!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thank', 'help', 'appreciate' 等关键词

content.speakerText: If you have any questions, call this number.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果还有问题，打这个电话。
expectedAnswers: Got it, I'll call right away. Thanks!
I'll make sure to call if I need help. Appreciate it!
Thanks for the number—I'll reach out if anything comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认行动并表达感谢
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的动词时态和介词
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化但得体的表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'call', 'thanks', 'appreciate' 或类似表达
